statement: In every magma, Equation 116 (`x = y * ((x * x) * z)`) implies Equation 3189 (`x = (((y * z) * x) * w) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0932
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) x) w) y)
